output.code:
with open('/mnt/data/file-LGbYkbFrr4gAZRG4ZmfmF8-text_to_analyse.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    raw = f.read()
print(raw)

spans = [
"وَمَا كُنتُمْ تُخْفُونَ أَن يُبْدى لِلرَّسولِ مِنْ أَصَابَ بَعْضُكُمْ مِنْكُمْ أَوْ أَنتُمْ أَصَحُّ لَهُ بِهِ",
"لَمْ يَكُنْ لِعِيسَى عِلْمٌ بِغَيْبِ اللَهِ إِلّا مَا أُوحِيَ إِلَيْهِ",
"لَمْ يَكُنْ لِسيدنا مُحَمَدٍ عِلْمٌ بِغَيْبِ اللَهِ إِلّا مَا أُوحِيَ إِلَيْهِ",
"وَمَا يَنْظُرُونَ إِلّا صَيْحَةً وَاحِدَةً تَأْخُذُهُمْ وَهُمْ يَزِحُونَ",
"لا عِلْمَ لِأَحَدٍ بِغَيْبِ اللَهِ إِلّا مَا أُوحِيَ إِلَيْهِ"
]
for s in spans:
    idxs = []
    start = 0
    while True:
        i = raw.find(s, start)
        if i==-1: break
        idxs.append(i)
        start = i+1
    print(s, idxs)

spans_data = []
for s in spans:
    spans_data.append((s, len(s)))
spans_data

spans_info=[]
# first ayah occurrences
for pos in [179,393]:
    s=spans[0]
    spans_info.append({"span_start":pos,"span_end":pos+len(s),"span_text":s,"citation_type":"Aya"})
# others
ctype_list=["Hadith","Hadith","Aya","Hadith"]
for s,ctype in zip(spans[1:],ctype_list):
    start=raw.find(s)
    spans_info.append({"span_start":start,"span_end":start+len(s),"span_text":s,"citation_type":ctype})
spans_info
